channel.title: Confidential Computing on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Confidential Computing on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Confidential Computing support for Azure Event Hubs Dedicated
item.description:
Azure Event Hubs Dedicated now supports Confidential Computing. It uses hardware-based trusted execution environments to help protect streaming data while it is processed in memory.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Confidential computing for Azure Service Bus Premium
item.description:
Confidential computing for Azure Service Bus Premium is now generally available in Korea Central and UAE North. It lets Service Bus process messages inside hardware-based trusted execution environments (TEEs) for added data protection.

  • Source: Azure Updates
